introduction.purposeAndScope: This document outlines the requirements for a new internal web application to manage employee paid time off (PTO) and sick leave requests.
introduction.overviewOfTheDocument: The document is organized starting with high-level background, followed by specific functional/data requirements, and concluding with technical appendices.

overallDescription.productPerspective: This system will replace the legacy email-based approval process and integrate directly with our existing Workday HRIS.
assumptionsAndDependencies: Employees have active Active Directory accounts for SSO.
constraints: Must be fully WCAG 2.1 AA compliant.
Must be deployed on the internal AWS GovCloud instance.

stakeholdersAndUsers.description: Users who approve or deny requests.

overallDescription.operatingEnvironment: Modern web browsers (Chrome, Edge, Firefox). Mobile responsive layout required.

functionalRequirements.title: Submit Leave Request
functionalRequirements.detailedBehavior: Users shall be able to select start/end dates, choose a leave type, and submit the request for managerial approval.

nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system must load the user dashboard in under 2 seconds on standard broadband connections.

interfaces.interactionDescription: System performs a GET request to retrieve the user's available leave hours upon login.

dataRequirements.databaseDesignNotes: Requires fields: id (UUID), user_id (FK), start_date (DATE), end_date (DATE), status (ENUM: Pending, Approved, Rejected).

errorAndExceptionHandling.systemResponse: Display friendly error message ('Unable to fetch balances at this time') and allow read-only access to past requests.

criteria: System prevents submission if requested dates overlap with an existing approved request.
System prevents submission if requested hours exceed available balance.

glossary.Managerial Approval: The digital sign-off required by an employee's direct supervisor recorded in the HRIS.
